definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="render_skybox" x="911" y="91"><field name="color">#cc0000</field><value name="texture"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">modid:textures/texture.png</field></block></value><value name="alpha"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><next><block type="render_skybox"><field name="color">#ffffcc</field><value name="texture"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">modid:textures/texture.png</field></block></value><value name="alpha"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value></block></next></block><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="75" y="160"><field name="trigger">on_sky_rendered</field><next><block type="controls_if"><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="293">This example will test if the random number is less than 0.7 (70%). Random numbers range between (0.0 and 1.0). If it is true, then it will run what is in the "do" section of the if statement.</comment><value name="IF0"><block type="compare_dimensionids"><value name="a"><block type="world_data_dimensionid"></block></value><value name="b"><block type="get_dimensionid"><field name="dimension">Surface</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops"><field name="OP">EQ</field><value name="A"><block type="world_data_isday"></block></value><value name="B"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">TRUE</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="controls_if"><mutation elseif="1"></mutation><comment pinned="false" h="85" w="293">This example will test if the random number is less than 0.7 (70%). Random numbers range between (0.0 and 1.0). If it is true, then it will run what is in the "do" section of the if statement.</comment><value name="IF0"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">EQ</field><value name="A"><block type="time_day_of_month"></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">31</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="call_procedure"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" inputs="0"></mutation><field name="procedure">EclipseEvent</field></block></statement><value name="IF1"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">NEQ</field><value name="A"><block type="time_day_of_month"></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">31</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO1"><block type="set_vanilla_texture"><field name="vanilla">SUN</field><value name="texture"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">mythicrealms:textures/environment/sun.png</field></block></value></block></statement></block></statement></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
